creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
- Update to 4.1.0

For Committer's reference:
http://pdr.s.ubze.ro/bulk/latest-per-pkg/libeXosip2/4.1.0/84i386-default.log
http://pdr.s.ubze.ro/bulk/latest-per-pkg/libeXosip2/4.1.0/84amd64-default.log
http://pdr.s.ubze.ro/bulk/latest-per-pkg/libeXosip2/4.1.0/92i386-default.log
http://pdr.s.ubze.ro/bulk/latest-per-pkg/libeXosip2/4.1.0/92amd64-default.log
http://pdr.s.ubze.ro/bulk/latest-per-pkg/libeXosip2/4.1.0/100i386-default.log
http://pdr.s.ubze.ro/bulk/latest-per-pkg/libeXosip2/4.1.0/100amd64-default.log
http://pdr.s.ubze.ro/bulk/latest-per-pkg/libeXosip2/4.1.0/110i386-default.log
http://pdr.s.ubze.ro/bulk/latest-per-pkg/libeXosip2/4.1.0/110amd64-default.log

Please create a repocopy of net/libexosip2 -> net/libexosip. Modify net/linphone-base LIB_DEPENDS
to point towards net/libexosip. And then update libexosip2 to 4.1.0.
